case_title: PETER WITH VS. CHANGIL CHUNG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PETER WITH. DEFENDANT CHANGIL CHUNG DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT CERO TECH, INC. DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WITH, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERO TECH, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,108.50, 1) CERO TECH MAY MAKE PAYMENTS AT $200.00/MONTH BEGINNING 1/15/19 AND ON THE 15TH OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID; 2) PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT CHANGIL CHUNG; THIS JUDGMENT RUNS AGAINST CERO TECH ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WITH, PETER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WITH, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, CHANGIL CERO TECH, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $33.50) SERVED SEP-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, CHANGIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WITH, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, CHANGIL CERO TECH, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $142.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,142.00, TWO WILLFUL/KNOWING VIOLATIONS ($1500 EACH) AND FOUR VIOLATIONS PREDATING DEMAND LETTER ($500.00 EACH). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF PETER WITH FILED BY PLAINTIFF WITH, PETER

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CHANGIL CHUNG, IS GRANTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PETER WITH. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHANGIL CHUNG INDIVIDUALLY AND BEHALF OF CERO TECH, INC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $33.50) SERVED SEP-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CERO TECH, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUNG, CHANGIL CERO TECH, INC. HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CERO TECH, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS (SC-225): THE PAYMENT ORDER ENTERED ON 12/5/18 IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PETER WITH. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHANGIL CHUNG INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF CERO TECH INC. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
